I

increaseAvailableTowers(int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.server.model.Tower
This method is used to increase the number of available towers after an island or a group of islands has been conquered by another towerColor
increasePrice() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.server.model.CharacterCards.CharacterCard
 
initClouds(int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.server.model.GameBoard
This method is used to initialise the Arraylist clouds

initIslands() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.network.server.model.GameBoard
This method is used to initialise the attribute islands and to place the students on each island
